title: Minecraft Civilisation: The Last Journey
description: This Modpack has been created for the use of the server 'MCC: The Last Journey'.
body: ## __You are fully able to use this Modpack for yourself, you DO NOT need to join the server in order to use!__ # __This Modpack has been made for the server 'MCC: The Last Journey',__ it provides QOL improvements to the vanilla experience, enhanced settings and improved performance to compensate, and new mechanics, blocks and items for you to get creative with! This Modpack includes some of best RPG mods available for forge 1.19.2, which features YASD, L_Ender's Cataclysm, and D&T! Although it's purpose is meant for multiplayer usage, you can still use this Modpack to it's fullest without joining 'MCC: The Last Journey'. ### IF YOU WANT TO PLAY THE EVENT, JOIN THE DISCORD❗ # # Please feel free to ask for help on my discord server, I'd be happy to help! The discord does also provide update information for 'MCC: The Last Journey' if you're interested! ### Attribution Requirements Hearth & Home - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hearth-and-home/files/4488854 Amplified Nether - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/amplified-nether/files/4441298 Effective - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective-forge/files Legendary Tooltips - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips/files Curios API - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios/files Naturalist - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist/files ### Permission to use the following: YASD (You Are Seeing Dungeons) - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/you-are-seeing-dungeons In the description # # ### Q: Will there be other versions other than 1.19.2? A: Since this Modpack is being used in my server, I will unfortunately not provide any other versions to the Modpack for the time being. ### Q: How do I join the server? A: You can find the IP on the discord. The discord is on the side bar. ### Q: I'd like to recommend a mod! A: That'll be greatly appreciated! Join the discord the server to tell me your suggestions! ### Q: The game keeps crashing A: I'll try to provide support on discord but if it's a hardware issue I cannot help you.
